subject: Docs Audit — Broken Links, Missing Images & Accuracy Issues
body: ## Documentation Audit Report Full sweep of `docs/` (55 markdown files). No files were modified. Findings grouped by category. --- ## 🔴 Broken Internal Links (5 found) | File | Links To | Problem | Suggested Fix | |------|----------|---------|---------------| | `docs/features/README.md` (line 17) | `../panels/loop-panel.md` | File does not exist | Change to `../panels/Loop.md` | | `docs/features/README.md` (line 19) | `../panels/tasks-panel.md` | File does not exist | Change to `../panels/Tasks.md` | | `docs/features/fullscreen-transcript.md` (line 98) | `view-modes.md` | File does not exist anywhere in docs | Remove link or create the target page | | `docs/getting-started/README.md` (line 42) | `visual-studio-external-tool.md` | File does not exist | Change to `VS Tooling.md` | | `docs/panels/Approvals.md` (line 118) | `loop-panel.md` | File does not exist | Change to `Loop.md` | --- ## 🟡 Warning — `nav_exclude` Page Linked from SUMMARY.md `docs/SUMMARY.md` contains a link to `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md`, which has both `nav_exclude: true` and `search_exclude: true` in its frontmatter. Readers following this link will reach a page intentionally excluded from navigation and search. Additional structural problem: the `Stand-alone Installer` entry in SUMMARY.md is nested under the `## Prompts` section heading — it should be grouped under Getting Started. **Severity:** Warning --- ## 🔴 Broken External Link | File | URL | Status| |------|-----|--------| | `docs/getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` (lines 29, 103) | `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` | **HTTP 404** | The actual repository is `MillerMark/squad-dash`. Both occurrences in that file use the wrong organisation/repo slug. **Severity:** Error --- ## ℹ️ Orphaned Pages (4 found) These pages are not reachable from `SUMMARY.md` or any inbound link in the docs tree: | File | Notes | |------|-------| | `docs/decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` | Has `nav_exclude: true`; intentional ADR, but fully unreachable | | `docs/decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` | Has `nav_exclude: true`; intentional ADR, but fully unreachable | | `docs/screenshots/README.md` | Has `nav_exclude: true`; no inbound links | | `docs/loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` | A functional loop config file stored inside `docs/`; not documentation — likely belongs in `.squad/` or a loops config directory | **Severity:** Info (ADR files appear intentionally hidden; `loop-files/` placement may be a mistake) --- ## 🟡 Missing Images (33 files) All missing images have an adjacent `📸 Screenshot needed` placeholder comment in the source markdown, indicating they are known pending work. They are listed here for completeness so they can be tracked to completion. ### `docs/concepts/images/` (4 missing) - `agent-cards-main-window.png` - `agent-transcript-multi-open.png` - `transcript-panel-layout.png` - `transcript-quick-reply.png` ### `docs/getting-started/images/` (3 missing) - `main-window-agent-cards.png` - `transcript-panel-open.png` - `preferences-dialog-speech.png` ### `docs/features/images/` (19 missing) - `hire-agent-result-sidebar.png` - `prompt-input-idle.png`, `prompt-input-abort.png` - `prompt-at-intellisense.png`, `prompt-at-accepted.png` - `fullscreen-view-menu.png`, `fullscreen-transcript-active.png`, `fullscreen-prompt-peek.png` - `attach-clipboard-text-pill.png` - `voice-input-recording.png`, `voice-input-annotation.png` - `prompt-queue-tabs.png`, `prompt-queue-tab-nav.png`, `prompt-queue-edit.png`, `prompt-queue-priority-feedback.png`, `prompt-queue-paused.png` - `text-formatting-inline-code.png`, `text-formatting-code-fence.png`, `text-formatting-inline-quote.png` ### `docs/panels/images/` (2 missing) - `tasks-panel-filter.png` - `tasks-filter-at-intellisense.png` ### `docs/reference/images/` (7 missing) - `tint-menu.png` - `preferences-dialog-speech-config.png` - `loop-settings-options-ui.png` - `loop-custom-ui-bool-checkbox.png`, `loop-custom-ui-enum-dropdown.png`, `loop-custom-ui-group-header.png`, `loop-custom-ui-text-input.png`, `loop-custom-ui-full-example.png` ### `docs/customization/images/` (3 missing) - `tint-swatches.png`, `tint-menu.png`, `accent-offset-menu.png` ### `docs/options/images/` (1 missing) - `options-overview.png` **Severity:** Warning (known placeholders, but render as broken `` tags until filled) --- ## ℹ️ Accuracy & Structural Issues (5 found) ### 1. Wrong product terminology — `docs/features/paste-image.md` The page refers to **"the Copilot CLI agent"** in its description. This is SquadDash documentation; the correct term should be "Squad agent" (or whichever product-specific term is used consistently elsewhere). **Severity:** Info ### 2. `open_panel` command — incomplete/stale panel list — `docs/reference/host-commands.md` The `open_panel` host command lists valid panel values as: `Approvals`, `Tasks`, `Trace`, `Health`. - **Missing panels** (all documented elsewhere in docs): `Loop`, `Notes`, `Maintenance`, `Inbox` - **Undocumented value:** `Health` — no panel named "Health" appears in any other doc page - **`Trace`** — not documented as a panel either; may be a legacy name **Severity:** Warning ### 3. `SUMMARY.md` structural error — `Stand-alone Installer` under wrong section The `[Stand-alone Installer]` entry in `docs/SUMMARY.md` appears under the `## Prompts` navigation section. It should be grouped under `## Getting Started`. **Severity:** Info ### 4. Stale entry in `.doc-status.json` The file references `getting-started/VS Toolong.md` (note the typo: "Toolong" instead of "Tooling"). The file `VS Tooling.md` exists; `VS Toolong.md` does not. This stale entry may cause doc-status tooling to report false negatives. **Severity:** Info ### 5. Empty table in `docs/concepts/agents.md` — "Tool Call Tracking" section The "Tool Call Tracking" table has column headers but zero data rows. This may be placeholder content awaiting documentation. **Severity:** Info --- ## Summary | Category | Count | Highest Severity | |----------|-------|------------------| | Broken internal links | 5 | 🔴 Error| | Broken external links | 1 (2 occurrences) | 🔴 Error | | nav_exclude page linked from SUMMARY | 1 | 🟡 Warning | | Missing images | 33 | 🟡 Warning | | Orphaned pages | 4 | ℹ️ Info | | Accuracy / structural issues | 5 | 🟡 Warning | **Recommended priority:** Fix the 5 broken internal links and the 1 broken external link (wrong GitHub repo URL) first — these affect navigability. The `open_panel` panel list in `host-commands.md` should also be updated as it is a reference page developers will rely on.

actions.label: Fix broken internal links
actions.prompt:
Arjun: during a docs audit, argus-weld found5 broken internal links in theSquadDash-public repo docs. Please fix them:

1. `docs/features/README.md` line 17: `../panels/loop-panel.md` → change to `../panels/Loop.md`
2. `docs/features/README.md` line 19: `../panels/tasks-panel.md` → change to `../panels/Tasks.md`
3. `docs/features/fullscreen-transcript.md` line 98: links to `view-modes.md` which does not exist anywhere in docs — either remove the link or investigate whether a view-modes page should be created
4. `docs/getting-started/README.md` line 42: `visual-studio-external-tool.md` → change to `VS Tooling.md`
5. `docs/panels/Approvals.md` line 118: `loop-panel.md` → change to `Loop.md`

Also fix the broken external link: `docs/getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` lines 29 and 103 reference `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` which returns HTTP 404. The correct repo is `MillerMark/squad-dash`. Update both occurrences to `https://github.com/MillerMark/squad-dash/releases`.

Please make these changes directly in the files.

actions.label: Fix open_panel panel list in host-commands.md
actions.prompt:
Arjun: during a docs audit, argus-weld found that `docs/reference/host-commands.md` lists the valid values for the `open_panel` host command as: `Approvals`, `Tasks`, `Trace`, `Health`. This is inconsistent with the panels actually documented in the docs tree, which include: `Tasks`, `Loop`, `Approvals`, `Notes`, `Maintenance`, `Inbox`. The values `Trace` and `Health` do not correspond to any documented panel.

Please review the actualSquadDash codebase (look for panel registration, panel names, or an enum/constant that lists panel identifiers) to determine the correct current set of valid `open_panel` values, then update the `open_panel` section in `docs/reference/host-commands.md` to match.
